basic_details.job_title: CUHP Non-Teaching Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Medical Officer, LDC and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Central University of Himachal Pradesh has published the Non-Teaching Positions Notification 2026 on its official website under Advertisement No. 002/2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill a total of 9 Non-Teaching vacancies. Candidates within the age criteria as per Government of India rules (including applicable relaxations for SC/ST/OBC/PwD and departmental candidates) and possessing qualifications such as MBBS with 4 years experience, Bachelor’s Degree with stenography/typing experience, Master’s Degree in Hindi/English with translation experience, 10th pass or ITI, typing proficienc

age_limit.age_details: As per GOI rules; 5 years for Central/State Govt/University employees; additional for SC/ST/OBC/PwD
age_limit.details: All Posts: As per GOI rules; 5 years for Central/State Govt/University employees; additional for SC/ST/OBC/PwD.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS with 4 years experience, Bachelor's Degree with stenography/typing experience, Master's Degree in Hindi/English with translation experience, 10th Pass or ITI, Bachelor's Degree with typing speed, 10+2 Science or 10th with Lab certificate
qualification.details: Medical Officer (Female): MBBS registered with MCI/State Medical Council with 4 years experience as Medical Officer. Private Secretary (On Direct Recruitment basis): Bachelor's Degree with 3 years as PA or 5 years as Stenographer, English/Hindi Stenography 120/100 wpm, Typing 35/30 wpm, computer knowledge. Private Secretary (On Deputation basis): Bachelor's Degree with 3 years as PA or 5 years as Stenographer, English/Hindi Stenography 120/100 wpm, Typing 35/30 wpm, computer knowledge. Hindi Translator (On Direct Recruitment basis): Master's Degree in Hindi/English or related with translation diploma/experience. Multi-Tasking Staff: 10th Pass or ITI Pass. Lower Division Clerk (LDC) (On Deputation basis): Bachelor's Degree with English/Hindi Typing 35/30 wpm and computer proficiency. Laboratory Attendant: 10+2 with Science or 10th with Science and Laboratory Technology certificate.

salary_details.details: Medical Officer (Female): Level-10 Private Secretary (On Direct Recruitment basis): Level-07 Private Secretary (On Deputation basis): Level-07 Hindi Translator (On Direct Recruitment basis): Level-06 Multi-Tasking Staff: Level-01 Lower Division Clerk (LDC) (On Deputation basis): Level-02 Laboratory Attendant: Level-01

selection_process: Written Test Skill Test Interview Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CUHP Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 26-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CUHP to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for CUHP Non-Teaching Positions?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the CUHP Non-Teaching Positions is 26 July 2026. Ensure you complete the process before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in the CUHP Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 9 vacancies for Non-Teaching Positions announced by the Central University of Himachal Pradesh for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for the Multi-Tasking Staff post?
faq.answer: For the Multi-Tasking Staff position, candidates need to have passed their 10th standard or possess an ITI Pass certificate.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for the CUHP Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an application fee. General/OBC candidates need to pay Rs. 1750, while SC/ST and Women candidates have to pay Rs. 1500.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary structure for the recruited candidates?
faq.answer: The salary for the Non-Teaching Positions ranges from Level-01 to Level-10, as per the government pay matrix.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves a Written Test, Skill Test, Interview, and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q7. Can candidates from other states apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The notification does not explicitly restrict applications based on state of origin, but candidates should check the detailed eligibility criteria in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the age relaxation policy for CUHP recruitment?
faq.answer: Age relaxation is provided as per Government of India rules, including 5 years for Central/State Govt/University employees and additional relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/PwD candidates.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, labeled as 'Official Notification PDF'.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of Central University of Himachal Pradesh?
faq.answer: The official website of Central University of Himachal Pradesh is www.cuhimachal.ac.in, where you can find more information and apply.
